notes: Cross-sectional Pearson-divergence: each symbol runs as its own single-position host but warms+reads the FULL 6-symbol cohort for the shared ranking (cross-symbol dependency in the SIGNAL, not execution). qm_magic_slot_offset must match the host symbol slot. D1-native (21-bar/month proxy). Warmup via QM_SymbolGuardInit+QM_BasketWarmupHistory. Closed-form/deterministic, NO ML, no external feed. All legs in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
